PubMed ID: 31898678. 2019/10/01 00:00. OBJECTIVE: To investigate the clinical, pathological, and genetic 
characteristics of patients with vaginal melanoma in a nationwide setting.

evidence.raw_snippet:
PubMed ID: 31898678. 2019/10/01 00:00. OBJECTIVE: To investigate the clinical, pathological, and genetic 
characteristics of patients with vaginal melanoma in a nationwide setting.
MATERIALS/METHODS: All patients diagnosed with vaginal melanoma from 1980 to 
2018 were collected by searching the digital archives of the Danish Registry of
